title: Immediate Release
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 503 implements a statewide standard for signature verification of mail-in ballots in California.",
    "The legislation aims to strengthen election integrity throughout California.",
    "Nearly 87% of the votes in the November 2020 general election were cast by mail.",
    "In the March 2020 primary, 72% of the ballots were cast by mail, and more than 100,000 ballots were rejected.",
    "Challenged signatures disproportionately impact California voters with limited English proficiency, voters living with disabilities, first-time and aging voters, and voters of color.",
    "A report published in April 2020 found disparities among more than 30 California counties in how signatures were evaluated and how challenged signatures were addressed."
  ]
}
```
